sub_pixel_system.notes: Puzzle game with grid-based tile mechanics; sub-pixel precision not applicable to gameplay

special_mechanics.name: Cursor Grid Rotation
special_mechanics.description: Player controls a cursor on a rectangular grid that rotates individual rows or columns in a manner similar to a Rubik's Cube to match cookies

special_mechanics.name: Grid Overflow
special_mechanics.description: Grid grows in size from cookies entering from the top and right sides; game over occurs when grid overflows

special_mechanics.name: Wild Card Cookie
special_mechanics.description: A sixth cookie type shaped like Yoshi's head occasionally appears and acts as a wild card to help clear lines of any other cookie type

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Puzzle game with no character movement physics. Documentation covers game mechanics (tile rotation, grid management) but contains no movement parameters, gravity, jump physics, or sub-pixel data. Physics extraction not applicable to this puzzle game paradigm.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Yoshi's Cookie (SNES)
